page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A Python GUI Application to Generate Maximal Unbiased Benchmarking Data Sets for Virtual Drug Screening.

MUBD-DecoyMaker2.0 is an easy-to-use computational tool to build maximal unbiased benchmarking sets for assessment of virtual screening approaches.

MUBD-DecoyMaker2.0 is a Python GUI application to generate maximal unbiased benchmarking sets data sets for virtual drug screening. It can be run on Windows-based machine and has no dependency
